teachingHint: Your child is learning the split digraph 'o-e' (as in 'home'). The 'e' at the end of the word jumps over the consonant to make the 'o' say its name — the long /oa/ sound. Help your child spot 'o_e' and blend: h-o-m-e → home, b-o-n-e → bone. The underlined words are for your child to read — you can help with the rest!
